summary_text: 1. **State-root split brain (`~/.config/kernel` vs repo `.fugue/kernel-state`) is the primary instability** - Evidence: [kernel-state-paths.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-state-paths.sh#L49) defaults canonical state to `~/.config/kernel`, but [kernel-runtime-status-surface.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-status-surface.sh#L7) and [kernel-runtime-claim.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-claim.sh#L7) default to repo `.fugue/kernel-state`. - Evidence: same run ID has contradictory provider truth: - repo ledger says `glm success_count: 0, failure_count: 1` for run `...102832:10551` in [runtime-ledger.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json#L1032). - home ledger says `glm success_count: 3, failure_count: 0` for the same run in [/Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/runtime-ledger.json](/Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/runtime-ledger.json#L1055). - Evidence: workspace receipt points to `.config` paths, not repo state, in [runtime workspace receipt](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-runtime-workspaces/adhoc_MacBook-Pro-M5-5_kernel-workspace_42806_run_20260402T102832_10551.json#L13). 2. **Provider lane reliability/auth instability is frequently collapsing bootstrap quality** - Evidence: hard failure reason explicitly records provider readiness problems: [runtime-ledger.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/runtime-ledger.json#L1083) (`glm failed twice; gemini timed out; cursor not ready; copilot auth missing`). - Evidence: GLM failure history exists for the target run in [glm-run-state.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/glm-run-state.json#L172). - Evidence: optional lane ledger shows repeated failures (`gemini-cli` and `copilot-cli` especially) in [.fugue optional-lane usage](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/optional-lane-usage.json) (aggregated locally: `gemini` 27 fails, `copilot` 16 fails, `cursor` 2 fails). 3. **Active-run lifecycle is stale (`run-resume`) while newer runs stay `running/preflight`** - Evidence: active pointer is still `run-resume` (updated 2026-03-31) in [4pane-active.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-state/4pane-active.json#L3). - Evidence: that active run is blocked/invalid due missing bootstrap receipt in [run-resume 4pane-state](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.fugue/kernel-workspaces/kernel-workspace/kernel-workspace--run-resume/artifacts/4pane-state.json#L14). - Evidence: newer target run remains `mode: running`, `current_phase: preflight` in [/Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/compact/adhoc_MacBook-Pro-M5-5_kernel-workspace_42806_run_20260402T102832_10551.json](/Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/compact/adhoc_MacBook-Pro-M5-5_kernel-workspace_42806_run_20260402T102832_10551.json#L5), i.e. lifecycle not closed. **User/config issue vs repo issue** - User/config dominant: - Specialist CLI availability/auth/version drift (`gemini/cursor/copilot`) and GLM command failures. - Operationally finishing tasks without consistent run-finalization flow. - Repo/design dominant: - State root inconsistency across scripts (`kernel-state-paths` vs substrate scripts). - No robust reconciliation to prevent stale active pointer or cross-root truth divergence. - Mixed: - Bootstrap/health may pass or fail depending on which state root a command reads. **Minimal fixes / mitigations (no code edit path first)** 1. Force one canonical state root per session before any kernel command: - `export KERNEL_STATE_ROOT="$HOME/.config/kernel"` - `export KERNEL_SUBSTRATE_STATE_ROOT="$HOME/.config/kernel"` 2. Re-open only the intended run ID and verify from one root: - `KERNEL_RUN_ID='adhoc:MacBook-Pro-M5-5:kernel-workspace:42806:run:20260402T102832:10551' bash scripts/lib/kernel-runtime-health.sh status` 3.
